steps.title: Identify the angle configuration from the figure
steps.content: Three lines intersect at point P. From the figure, the three labeled angles $x°$, $y°$, and $z°$ lie on the same side of one of the lines, so together they span a straight angle along that line.

steps.title: Apply the straight angle property
steps.content:
Angles forming a straight line sum to $180°$:
$$x° + y° + z° = 180°$$
Substituting $x = 65$ and $y = 75$:
$$65 + 75 + z = 180$$
$$140 + z = 180$$
$$z = 40$$
That matches choice C — C is correct.
